vpc_peering_config.description: The VPC Peering configuration is used to create VPC peering between databasemigrationservice and the consumer's VPC. Structure is [documented below](#nested_vpc_peering_config).

vpc_name.description: Fully qualified name of the VPC that Database Migration Service will peer to. Format: projects/{project}/global/{networks}/{name}

subnet.description: A free subnet for peering. (CIDR of /29)

location.description: The name of the location this private connection is located in.

labels.description: Labels. **Note**: This field is non-authoritative, and will only manage the labels present in your configuration. Please refer to the field `effective_labels` for all of the labels present on the resource.

create_without_validation.description: If set to true, will skip validations.

project.description: If it is not provided, the provider project is used.
